an6.92:1.0.1: "Bhikkhus, there are these six cases of incapability. What six?One accomplished in view is (1) incapable of dwelling without reverence and deference toward the Teacher; (2) incapable of dwelling without reverence and deference toward the Dhamma; (3) incapable of dwelling without reverence and deference toward the Saṅgha; (4) incapable of dwelling without reverence and deference toward the training; (5) incapable of resorting to anything that should not be relied upon;(6) incapable of undergoing an eighth existence.These are the six cases of incapability."
